title: Lanes closed following accident in Great Brak River
bodyText:
GREAT BRAK RIVER NEWS -  A motor vehicle accident has taken place today, 23 December in Great Brak River, opposite the De Dekke Spar.


> One truck is involved and appears to have moved off the road. One person has reportedly been injured.


Police and emergency medical services have responded to the scene.

As a result of the accident, all lanes have been closed.

At this stage, the cause of the accident is unknown.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
